description: Upgrade all of your citizen hoplites to Elite rank.
requirementsTooltip: Unlocked in Empire Phase. Requires “Advanced Hoplites.”
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]Advanced Hoplites auto-promote to Elite Rank:
• Hoplites +10% health.
• Hoplites +10% attack damage and capture power.
• Hoplites +10% train time and +5 food and wood costs.[/font]
